HUL.name: Hull City (Promoted)
HUL.note: Note: Heavy rotation tax — Jakirovic rotated Hughes, Giles, Slater between matches in Championship. Avoid as starters in opening 26/27 squad.

LIV.name: Liverpool
LIV.note: MAJOR REGIME CHANGE: Slot departed despite winning 25/26 PL title. Andoni Iraola (just left BOU at end of 25/26) is the strong rumor. Iraola's profile = high-press · vertical · transition football — fits Frimpong/Kerkez attacking-WB roles, Isak's mobility, Wirtz as #10 in transition. But: Iraola has never managed at top-6 level. Combined with 5 WC reps + 3 gold-pick departures (TAA, Salah, Robbo) = HIGH-VARIANCE. Apply 0.8× until system + first-XI confirmed in pre-season friendlies.

MCI.name: Man City
MCI.manager: Maresca strong option (Pep gone) · Multiple departures
MCI.note: Major rebuild: Pep + Bernardo + Stones + KDB + Walker + Grealish all gone or going. Apply 0.8× discount. Haaland's "auto-default captain" status broken.

MUN.name: Man Utd
MUN.note: RB hierarchy under Carrick: Dalot > Mazraoui — Dalot logged more RB minutes in 25/26. For 26/27 FPL: Dalot (POR) is the MUN RB pick despite same 0.85× WC discount as Mazraoui (MAR).

WHU.name: West Ham 🔻
WHU.note: 26/27 status: West Ham confirmed relegated end of 25/26 season. Players with PL clauses (Bowen most likely, plus Castellanos, Summerville, Kilman, Walker-Peters) will be aggressively pursued by other PL clubs. The IN/OUT records below were the 25/26 transfer history; the 26/27 squad shape will not exist as a PL roster. WHU drops off the FPL toolkit's WC-load cross-reference (was tagged "zero WC load" — now irrelevant for PL planning).
